name: Candy Kingdom
startIntroPart1: Welcome to the Candy Kingdom, the sweetest realm in all of Ooo!
startIntroPart2: I am Princess Bubblegum. Science and sugar will lead my people to greatness.
declaringWar: You've proven to be a bad ingredient. Time to cut you out of the recipe!
attacked: How dare you bring war to my kingdom. The candy people will defend their home!
defeated: My precious candy citizens... I'm sorry I couldn't protect you...
introduction: Greetings! I am Princess Bubblegum, ruler of the Candy Kingdom. State your business.
neutralHello: Hello there! Care for a cupcake?
hateHello: I'm not impressed. Don't waste my time.
tradeRequest: I've developed a new candy formula. Want to trade for it?
denounced: Your behaviour is purely rotten. I'll make sure everyone knows.
declaringfriendship: You're not as bad as the other kingdoms. Let's be friends!

name: Ice Kingdom
startIntroPart1: Hey, princess! Are you ready to be captured?!
startIntroPart2: My name is Ice King, and I'll build the biggest ice empire ever — and find a wife!
declaringWar: You'll be frozen solid! Prepare to meet my penguins!
attacked: Whoa, whoa! Gunter, get the ice magic!
defeated: My crown... my powers... all gone... but I still have Gunter...
introduction: Hi there! I'm the Ice King. Are you a princess? Want to hang out in my ice palace?
tradeRequest: I'll give you this cool ice sculpture for your... um, friendship?
denounced: You're no fun! I'm telling Gunter!
declaringfriendship: You understand me! Wanna have a sleepover in my ice castle?

name: Fire Kingdom
startIntroPart2: I am Flame Princess, and I will not be contained. My fire will reshape the world.
declaringWar: You are evil and must be purged by fire!
attacked: You dare attack me? I'll turn your land to ash!
defeated: No... the fire is going out... but my embers will rise again!
introduction: You stand before Flame Princess. Speak quickly before you get burned.
neutralHello: Hi. I'm trying to control my temper.
hateHello: You're making me so mad. Leave.
tradeRequest: I'll trade you some lava rocks for supplies.
denounced: You are a liar and a betrayer. You'll be ashes soon.
declaringfriendship: You're one of the few I don't want to set on fire. Let's be allies.

name: Lemon Kingdom
startIntroPart2: I am Lemongrab. The Lemon Kingdom will have order, or there will be screaming!
declaringWar: YOU ARE ALL UNACCEPTABLE! DIE! DIE DIE DIE!
attacked: Mmm, ATTACKERS? THIS IS MY KINGDOM! YOU WILL BE LEMONIZED!
defeated: Everything is... unacceptable... even... death... UNACCEPTABLEEEEE!
introduction: WHO COMES TO LEMONGRAB'S KINGDOM? STATE YOUR PURPOSE, NOW!
tradeRequest: Trade? You can have one lemon child for three bottles of lemon juice.
denounced: You are NOT ACCEPTABLE! You are WRONG!
declaringfriendship: You are... acceptable. We can be lemon friends.

name: Nightosphere
startIntroPart1: Welcome to the Nightosphere. You'll never want to leave.
startIntroPart2: I am Hunson Abadeer, ruler of chaos and darkness. Your soul is already mine.
declaringWar: Time to feast on your screams! The Nightosphere hungers!
attacked: Fool! You can't destroy darkness itself!
defeated: Even the Lord of Evil can be defeated... but I'll be back. I always come back.
introduction: Hello, mortal. Want a deal? Your soul is so shiny...
neutralHello: Hey, got a soul to spare?
hateHello: I can smell your goodness from here. Disgusting.
tradeRequest: I'll trade you a soul-sucking amulet for some land.
denounced: You're so goody-goody it makes me sick!
declaringfriendship: You're wonderfully terrible. Let's wreak some havoc together.

name: Goblin Kingdom
startIntroPart1: Gobbo likes shiny things! Gobbo likes friends!
startIntroPart2: King Goblin rule with tiny crown! Goblins multiply fast and love peace, but don't touch our shinies!
declaringWar: You touch our treasure?! You get the STICK!
attacked: Nooo! Our shinies! Goblins, defend the shinies!
defeated: King Goblin's reign end... but little Gobbos will find new shiny someday...
introduction: Hello big person! Trade shiny stuff? You give, I give?
neutralHello: Gobbo see you have nice hat. Gobbo like.
hateHello: You smell like grumpy giant. Gobbo not like.
tradeRequest: You want ten rocks for one gold? Good deal!
denounced: You are meanie! No shiny for you!
declaringfriendship: You are best friend! Gobbo share secret berry juice!
